Id.description: A unique identifier for this payment.

Amount.description: The total amount of sales that were made on the sale date, including all payment methods that were used and taxes that were collected.

Method.description: The method used to make this payment.

Type.description: The payment method type used for the client’s purchase.

Notes.description: Payment notes that are entered under the selected payment method in the Retail screen before completing the sale.
Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

TransactionId.description: The ID of transaction. Use this ID when calling the GET Transactions endpoint.
